title: The media catalog is read-only discovery, and 'empty' is normal
summary: spideriq-media-catalog reads the per-tenant media_assets DAM catalog (Phase 0 backfill + non-blocking forward-sync). It never uploads/transforms/deletes, and an empty result for a tenant with no ingested media is a completed read, not a failure. Asset ids are catalog UUIDs, distinct from job ids and peertube_uuid.
references: docs/services/SpiderMedia/ (architecture: SeaweedFS canonical + R2 referenced + PeerTube video)
SpiderMedia build board 401a8879 task 1.1 (live), task 1.3 (this skill)
